title: I.AM...IRON MAN
description: Changes the texture of ghast in Minecraft to iron man without affecting that little chip. Very easy to install and super easy to enjoy!
body:
# Iron ghast

- I was just bored with the old ghast textures so I thought it would be very fun if I changed it to **IRON MAN**.
- I tested it on the fabric/sodium and optifine and it works all fine without any issue. 
- It also works with other texture packs very well too!!


## Installation
1. First download this texture pack from here (modrinth) and make sure you are downloading the right version of the pack.
2. Next locate your game's directory and from there you should go to .minecraft or instances folder.
3. In there You will see folder named resource packs, go there and paste the downloaded .zip file of this pack.
4. Open your game by choosing the same instance in which the resource pack is and then go to settings/resource packs/ click the arrow icon on the ghast texture pack.
5. Click done.
6. ~~**Useless**~~**VERY IMPORTANT** YOU GUYS HAVE TO ENJOY THE TEXTURE PACK.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

It looks like this while in game:
![Ghast image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/286de866d4b9f707b38f634db139749afc347fbe.jpeg)


</details>

Feel free to use it in your own texture pack publicly but please mention my works.

**NOTE** - If it doesn't work in sodium than try installing the dependency mod along with fabric api and check if there are any overrides in your pack selection list like other texture packs who changes ghast texture.
If it doesn't work in optifine than check if you have turned on custom entity texture like option.
